case_title: TIMOTHY J. MEHEW VS. SEAN S WELLS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEHEW, TIMOTHY J. AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, SEAN S AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEHEW, TIMOTHY J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS, SEAN S AN INDIVIDUAL $13,160.70 PRINCIPAL, $27.09 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,487.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
